proposed_relations.description: Proposed bus lane relocation to SB approach is a treatment within the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Relocates bus lane to SB approach • Provides more loading bet Pres. and Carroll Sts • Reduces bus delays on SB approach to Eastern Pkwy. • Minimal impact on parking spaces

rationale: Block p007_c0005 under 'Proposed Improvement' heading (p007_c0002) explicitly describes relocating the bus lane to the southbound approach on Utica Ave near Eastern Parkway as a proposed improvement within the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Relocates bus lane to SB approach • Provides more loading bet Pres. and Carroll Sts • Reduces bus delays on SB approach to Eastern Pkwy. • Minimal impact on parking spaces

quarantine.note: Cited block p007_c0005 does not state the connection between the proposed bus lane relocation and the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study project. The connection is inferred solely from document structure (the presentation is about the study). Per review rule 'co-occurrence in a document is not a relation,' the cited block text must actually state the connection.

proposed_relations.description: TSP, signal timing, left turn bays, and pedestrian safety improvements are treatments in the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Signal timing improvements for all traffic • Transit Signal Priority (TSP) for buses • Left turn bays to reduce blockages by turning vehicles • Pedestrian safety improvements

rationale: Block p010_c0004 under 'Other Improvements' heading (p010_c0002) explicitly lists signal timing improvements, TSP for buses, left turn bays, and pedestrian safety improvements as other improvements proposed within the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Signal timing improvements for all traffic • Transit Signal Priority (TSP) for buses • Left turn bays to reduce blockages by turning vehicles • Pedestrian safety improvements

quarantine.note: Cited block p010_c0004 does not state the connection between 'Other Improvements' (TSP, signal timing, left turn bays, pedestrian safety) and the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study project. The connection is inferred from document structure only. The cited block text does not mention the study.

proposed_relations.description: Traffic congestion is worst on Utica Ave approaches to Eastern Parkway

evidence_refs.source_quote: Traffic congestion is worst on approaches to Eastern Parkway

rationale: p006_c0004 states 'Traffic congestion is worst on approaches to Eastern Parkway'. The slide context ('Existing Conditions') and the study area map on the same page make clear this refers to Utica Avenue approaches to Eastern Parkway.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Traffic congestion is worst on approaches to Eastern Parkway

quarantine.note: Cited block p006_c0004 states only 'Traffic congestion is worst on approaches to Eastern Parkway' — it never mentions Utica Avenue or the Utica Ave corridor. The connection to corridor_utica-ave-carroll-to-church relies on slide context and a map on the same page (as the rationale itself acknowledges), which is co-occurrence in a document, not a relation stated in the block text.
